sigWerErrors.reason: '高' (increase) and '供' (provide) are completely different in meaning, changing the intent of the sentence.
Omitting '我' (I) removes the subject, making the sentence less clear and changing the meaning.
'信' (credit) and '新' (new) are unrelated, which changes the meaning of the noun phrase.
Inserting '户' (user/account) introduces a new concept not present in the original sentence, altering the meaning.
